question: [File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/health/ImporterLagHealthIndicator.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: evaluate()] Can an unprivileged external user craft a Prometheus response where data is non-null but data.result() is null, causing isValid() to return false, getSeries() to return an empty list, evaluate() to return UP, and gossip to continue unchecked even when the importer is severely lagging?
